name: ZombieShooter
description: Zombie Shooter design with well graphics and realistic. It is a super cool game in which you must kill all the zombies, direct hits of bullets, as well as the rebound! Share what you’re capable of and destroy all the zombies as fast as possible! Made in Construct 2. Enjoy the game! It is a super cool game in which you must kill all the zombies, direct hits of bullets, as well as the rebound! Simple-to-play but hard-to-master.
